channel.title: Bhai Sahib Singh Canada Wale
channel.description: Gurbani, Sakhis and Katha by Bhai Sahib Singh — uplifting spiritual content rooted in Sikhi.
channel.itunes:author: Bhai Sahib Singh
channel.itunes:summary: Gurbani, Sakhis and Katha by Bhai Sahib Singh — uplifting spiritual content rooted in Sikhi.

item.title: Why do we need to meditate daily?
item.description:
Why is daily Nitnem non-negotiable? 🙏 Just like a borewell must dig deep to reach water, our daily prayers dig deep into our soul to cleanse it from within. Bani carries divine power — it removes negativity and writes peace into your destiny! ✨💧 Watch this powerful Q&A to never miss your Nitnem again.
Watch on YouTube:
item.itunes:title: Why do we need to meditate daily?
item.itunes:summary: Why is daily Nitnem non-negotiable? 🙏 Just like a borewell must dig deep to reach water, our daily prayers dig deep into our soul to cleanse it from within. Bani carries divine power — it removes negativity and writes peace into your destiny! ✨💧 Watch this powerful Q&A to never miss your Nitnem again.
